summary: This is a brief logistical announcement about a drinks reception in Edinburgh on May 19, 2007. Joel provides the venue details (Radisson SAS hotel, St. Giles room) and encourages people to sign up. He notes the room can easily accommodate everyone. The post is purely informational with no substantive argument or analysis.
key_points: Announcement of a community meetup/drinks reception in Edinburgh on May 19, 2007
Venue is the Radisson SAS hotel in the St. Giles room
Joel encourages sign-ups and asks people to remove their names if they can't attend
key_insight: A short logistical announcement about a community meetup with no broader insight or argument.
